items.title: U.K. PM Starmer says he has not lost authority, will fight to stay in job
items.summary: “I’m ​not going to ‌walk away,” Mr. Starmer told the BBC, making his first public comments since Healey’s shock resignation. With rivals expected to launch a contest ‌to replace him in the coming weeks ​or months, Mr. Starmer said he would fight any challenge to his role
